description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a wooden fence, featuring a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout. The property includes a driveway with a carport, a backyard with a trampoline, a swimming pool, and a large treehouse built around a mature tree. The bungalow has multiple large windows, some grouped together, allowing for ample natural light, and a patio area with outdoor seating. The exterior walls are primarily white with some gray accents, and the landscaping includes shrubs and a well-maintained lawn. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and functional outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and outdoor amenities including a pool, trampoline, and treehouse, all enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, trampoline, swimming pool, and treehouse in the backyard.
description_view_1: Rear angle highlighting the treehouse, backyard, and the open layout of the bungalow with visible interior rooms.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the treehouse, grouped windows, and the trampoline in the backyard.
description_view_3: Oblique view showing the carport, main entrance, and the arrangement of rooms and outdoor features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
